Dangerous Liaisons

"Lust. Seduction. Revenge. The game as you've never seen it played before."

7.2
1988MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.

Tags

planlovesicknessparis, francebased on novel or bookcheatingcynicsexualityboredompraiseloverladykillerfiancéseductionlove lettercourtly life
